success_criteria: All child safety and mission-assurance verification records shall be released or dispositioned before simulated pad operations.

success_criteria: Hazard controls for pad access, inhibited energy, lifting, pressure, and emergency response shall be marked closed or accepted by waiver.
rationale: Pad operations, lifting, pressure, access control, and emergency response are in project scope.

success_criteria: Each catastrophic or critical hazard in ATGSD-HAZ-001 shall have closure evidence before simulated pad operations.

success_criteria: Calculated margins shall be positive for qualification and acceptance load cases, and released drawings shall match analyzed configuration.

success_criteria: All fracture-critical metallic records shall include material heat trace, inspection method, acceptance class, inspector ID, and disposition.

success_criteria: Operator-adjacent lift fixtures shall satisfy proof-test and design-factor criteria; non-load-path panels shall be dispositioned by tailoring record.

success_criteria: Disconnects, overcurrent devices, labels, lockout points, and maintenance clearances shall match released drawing ATGSD-DWG-2200.

success_criteria: Bonding resistance from each tested item to the equipment grounding bar shall be less than or equal to 2.5 milliohms.

success_criteria: Harness inspection shall show accepted crimp, solder, strain relief, marking, and routing records for H-100 through H-140.

success_criteria: Wire BOM shall identify MIL-DTL-16878 slash sheet, conductor size, insulation type, voltage rating, and temperature rating for each harness segment.

success_criteria: Materials matrix shall disposition each ignition, oxygen, and enclosed-operator exposure item with accepted screening result or waiver.

success_criteria: Oxygen-service components shall be on the approved parts list and shall have clean, bagged, capped, and tagged status before final connection.

success_criteria: Hydrostatic test shall be 1.5 times design pressure with no visible leakage; pneumatic pressure-decay shall be less than or equal to 1 psig over 10 minutes.

success_criteria: Each flexible hose shall have proof-pressure certification within 12 months, valid shelf life, cleanliness caps installed, and no failed visual inspection item.

success_criteria: Lift fixture proof-load test shall complete at required load factor with no permanent deformation, failed inspection point, or unresolved NCR.
